<var>
$DPS$ = (Normal Damage * Crit Swing-- + Crit Damage) / (Crit Swing * Swingrate)
$CDMG$ = {{#expr:Normal Damage * Crit Multiplier round 0}}
$BTDMG$ = {{#expr:ceil((4 * (1^0.9)) * (Health^0.2))}}
$BCDMG$ = {{formatnum:{{#expr:ceil((4 * (450^0.9)) * (Health^0.2))}}}}
$FNC-COST$ = 2400; 1000; 4800; 11003; 40000
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$CREF$ = <ref>Number listed is the required number of shots for it to deal a critical hit.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref>DPS is calculated as (Damage × 2 + Crit Damage) ÷ Crit Swing ÷ Swingrate. DPS does not include bleed damage.</ref>
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Sleight of Hands; Bloodlust; Psycho Knife; Ocean Of Blood
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 92740435796975; 93224058728799; 102669883500047; 102686099141752
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 1; 2;
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Exclusive
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Normal Damage !! Crit Multiplier !! Crit Damage !! Base Bleed Damage !! Swingrate !! Crit Swing$CREF$ !! Bleed Stack !! EV !! Max Stack !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 2 || $CDMG$ || N/A || 0.4 || 3 || N/A || N/A || N/A || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 14 || 2 || $CDMG$ || N/A || 0.4 || 3 || N/A || N/A || N/A || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 14 || 2.1 || $CDMG$ || 4 || 0.6 || 3 || 13 || 0.2 || 450 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 24 || 2.5 || $CDMG$ || 4 || 0.55 || 3 || 20 || 0.2 || 450 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 38 || 4 || $CDMG$ || 4 || 0.5 || 3 || 45 || 0.2 || 450 || 5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"
! colspan="3" | Bleed Damage
|-
! Health !! Tick Damage !! Collapse Damage
|-
| 100 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|-
| 500 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|-
| 1,000 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|-
| 5,000 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|-
| 10,000 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|-
| 50,000 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|-
| 100,000 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|-
| 500,000 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|-
| 1,000,000 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|-
| 5,000,000 || $BTDMG$ || $BCDMG$
|}
</div>
